title: Supply, Fabrication, Testing and other works on Scrubber Vessels & skids for TAKORADI-TEMA INTERCONNECTION PROJECT (TTIP)
content:
Project Name: Supply, Fabrication, Inspection & Testing, Surface preparation and Painting of Scrubber Vessels & skids for TAKORADI-TEMA INTERCONNECTION PROJECT (TTIP).
Client: PEERLESS EMEA.
Project code: 471081/4018006.
Description: Scope 1 - Supply, Fabrication, Inspection & Testing, Surface preparation and Painting of Scrubber Vessels -2 nos – U 2 Stamp.
Scope 2 – Supply of Piping, Structure, Grating material & Fabrication & assembly of skid – 2 Nos, Inspection & Testing, Surface preparation and Painting, Supply of Spares & Packing.
Location: GHANA.
Field of activity: Manufacturing Works.
Market sector: Oil & Gas.
Status: Completed 2018.
Duration: Jan 2018 – Oct 2018.
MO 304, Jebel Ali free Zone, Dubai, UAE
